label: animal
groundingNote: a living thing of one kind; it can move, it can see, it can hear, it can feel; it is not someone: it cannot say words, it cannot think like people can think; there are many kinds of these living things; some live near people, some live far from people
notes: Superordinate creature molecule (NSM 'creature'); grounds the animal-kind molecules and pet/bug/tail/wing transitively.
